title: Prepare 2L of 2X freezer buffer to freeze down C. elegans

steps: %s %s Ingredients Quantity NaCl 1M 200ml 1M KH2PO4 pH 6 100ml Glycerol 600ml Double distilled H2O up to 2L Autoclave 0.1M MgSO4 300 microlitres per 100ml bottle

%s %s 1 Combine NaCl, KH2PO4 and Glycerol solutions with approx 900ml double distilled H2O in 2L measuring cylinder on magnetic stirrer. 2 Make up to volume using double distilled H2O 3 Aliquot into 20x100ml media bottles,label,date and autoclave. 4 After autoclaving and the solution is cold,add 300 microlitres of 0.1m MgSO4 to each 100ml bottle using a Gilson in the flow hood.
